title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Luffy, Big Mom as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but that shouldn't matter! We were following a simple one-way path!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we had to do was go straight down this ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: 8Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: 8 YIKES ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huhhhhh?! the trees and flowers are moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hup...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: J woah, 8 oops...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The ground moved and talked!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world?! What's the deal with this creepy forest?! Explain yourselves?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We've been found out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: we & sure have.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there was no correct "path" to begin with....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you finally realized how scary the woods can be, darling?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! wait, what's gotten into you all of a sudden luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right now, you're in the middle of the "seducing woods"...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami, that thing isn't the real Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who, you ask? Uihuih- Uihuih

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been right next to you this whole time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how much you run, you'll never be able to escape these woods!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now now darling, quit struggling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TAKE A LOOK AT THE SCAR ON MY FACE... ISN'T IT JUST TERRIBLE?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who are you?! a tree?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we've got here an adorable little bunny rabbit and an adorable little girl....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 8th daughter of the Charlotte family Charlotte Brolee

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm overcome with the urge to slice them up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No, Bitch!!! The name's bullet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just splendid... The thing is, whenever I see such flawless, alluring faces...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Eeeee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Big Mom's Castle, "Whole Cake Chateau"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...or rather, the lake right behind it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 'April- Cokko*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a German ship!! You may pass through!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Big Mom's Subor- Dinate crews...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: as well as crews that are in the process of becoming so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: are all granted access to this port.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: All clear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Back up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Keep going!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Keep going!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Germa" refers to the only ocean-going kingdom that exists in the world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and one that rules over no stable land.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And when they all come back together, that is when their country is wholly formed once more.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a country ruled by the Vinsmokes, a family renowned for seizing control over the entirety of North Blue in the years past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This... is the place known as "Germa Kingdom".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: who spend every waking moment training, and they dare not miss a day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with a powerful army known as the "Germa 66"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: which is feared across the world even to this day,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The vast majority of its citizens are male soldiers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How long do you plan on sitting there?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
